emails.subject: Trader
emails.body: Susan/Alan/Sara As you will note below, Darren, Jane and I met with B&M to discuss the potential tax issues related to Darren's activities in Japan. The going forward strategy will be tax driven, therefore we will need to have Susan's input/suggestions. If we may be of further assistance, please let us know. Cheers, John Forwarded by John Viverito/Corp/Enron on 09/21/2000 07:02 PM Paul.TYO.Davis@BakerNet.com 09/21/2000 04:58 AM

emails.subject: Re: Trader
emails.body: Re: Trader Hi John! Guess where I am again. I am going to give you a call shortly about the attached. (It's 12:38 a.m. in New York right now and I'm researching on Lexis.) It looks like we're trying to sign next week. If I don't catch you, what's the timing on this? Can I review it this weekend? Best regards, Susan From: John Viverito@ENRON on 09/21/2000 07:12 PM

emails.subject: Re: Trader
emails.body: Hi Susan- Thanks for giving me a ring regarding the trading issues. Do you ever get to take a break? It would be great if you could review the potential structures this weekend and provide your specific advice by Monday, or as soon thereafter as possible. Looking forward to seeing you soon. Best regards, John Susan Musch@ENRON_DEVELOPMENT 09/21/2000 11:32 PM
